Operation 'submitSources' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical details about authentication requirements, accepted threat categories, return values, and the submission workflow. Added specifics about categorization options, authentication, response format, and side effects (community review process) to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Submit new threat intelligence sources to the community database.
data.description_suggestion: Submit new threat intelligence sources to the community database for threat categorization and validation. Accepts sources categorized as malware, phishing, spam, scam, fraud, botnet, ransomware, or C2. Requires authentication. Returns submission confirmation with tracking ID and validation status. Submitted sources are queued for community review and may be added to threat intelligence feeds upon verification.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about authentication requirements, accepted threat categories, return values, and the submission workflow. Added specifics about categorization options, authentication, response format, and side effects (community review process) to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getBlocklistStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is generic. Description lacks context about specific blocklist types available and use cases. Added details about blocklist categories (IP vs domain), specific list names, and clarified that no authentication is required. This helps AI agents understand what data is returned and when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Get entry counts and last updated timestamps for all available blocklists.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve entry counts, last updated timestamps, and availability information for all blocklists. Returns statistics for IP-based blocklists (critical, all, C2, botnet) and domain-based blocklists (phishing, malware, ransomware, all). No authentication required. Useful for determining blocklist freshness and planning bulk downloads.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description lacks context about specific blocklist types available and use cases. Added details about blocklist categories (IP vs domain), specific list names, and clarified that no authentication is required. This helps AI agents understand what data is returned and when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'downloadBlocklist' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description is too vague and omits critical information. Added specific blocklist filenames, plan-based access restrictions, file format details, and parameter requirements. This enables AI agents to understand available options, access limitations, and expected output format.

data.current_description: Download a specific blocklist file.
data.description_suggestion: Download a specific blocklist file in plaintext format. Available blocklists include IP-based lists (blocklist-ips-critical.txt, blocklist-ips-all.txt, blocklist-ips-c2.txt, blocklist-ips-botnet.txt) and domain-based lists (blocklist-domains-phishing.txt, blocklist-domains-malware.txt, blocklist-domains-ransomware.txt, blocklist-domains-all.txt). FREE plan users receive 10% sample (lite version); BASIC+ plans receive full blocklists. Returns plaintext file with one entry per line. Requires filename parameter matching available blocklist names.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague and omits critical information. Added specific blocklist filenames, plan-based access restrictions, file format details, and parameter requirements. This enables AI agents to understand available options, access limitations, and expected output format.

message: Operation 'bulkCheckInfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, unclear_purpose, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Original summary is vague about the operation's purpose. Description lacks clarity about what data is returned and why an agent would use this operation. Added context about return values (limits, quota, reset info), use case (determining batch constraints), and relationship to the POST operation. data.current_description: Returns plan-specific batch limits and usage. Use **POST** `/bulk/check` to run batch lookups.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve bulk check plan limits and current usage
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve plan-specific batch limits and current usage statistics for bulk threat intelligence checks. Returns maximum entities per request, remaining quota, and reset information based on subscription plan. Use this operation to determine batch size constraints before calling POST `/bulk/check` for actual threat lookups. Helps optimize bulk checking workflows and prevent quota exhaustion.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about the operation's purpose. Description lacks clarity about what data is returned and why an agent would use this operation. Added context about return values (limits, quota, reset info), use case (determining batch constraints), and relationship to the POST operation. This improves AI agent interpretability for workflow planning.

message: Operation 'bulkCheck' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate. Description lacks important details about authentication requirements, return format, entity ordering, and support for mixed entity types. Added specifics about what data is returned per entity, how to determine batch limits, and clarified that results maintain input order for easier result mapping.

data.current_description: Check up to N entities per request (N depends on subscription plan). Each entity may be a domain, IP, or URL string.
data.description_suggestion: Perform threat intelligence checks on multiple entities (domains, IPs, or URLs) in a single request. Batch size limit depends on subscription plan (retrieve limits via GET `/bulk/check`). Each entity is checked against threat databases and returns reputation scores, threat categories, and associated metadata. Requires authentication. Returns array of check results with one result per submitted entity, maintaining input order. Supports mixed entity types within single request.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description lacks important details about authentication requirements, return format, entity ordering, and support for mixed entity types. Added specifics about what data is returned per entity, how to determine batch limits, and clarified that results maintain input order for easier result mapping.

message: Operation 'checkAll' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on inputs (target parameter, enrichment levels), outputs (specific data returned), and the relationship between enrichment levels and response content. Enhanced version explains the configurable enrichment model and what each level provides, enabling AI agents to select appropriate enrichment based on their needs.

data.current_description: Comprehensive threat intelligence check for IPs and domains.
data.description_suggestion: Executes a comprehensive threat intelligence check for IP addresses and domains with configurable enrichment levels. Accepts a target (IP or domain) and optional enrichment level parameter (basic, standard, or full). Returns threat status, reputation scores, geolocation, WHOIS data, SSL/TLS certificates, and vulnerability information. Enrichment level determines additional data included: basic provides malicious status and core data; standard adds risk scoring and MITRE mapping; full includes detection timeline and related infrastructure analysis.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on inputs (target parameter, enrichment levels), outputs (specific data returned), and the relationship between enrichment levels and response content. Enhanced version explains the configurable enrichment model and what each level provides, enabling AI agents to select appropriate enrichment based on their needs.

data.current_description: Get reputation data from aggregated threat intelligence sources including VirusTotal integration.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve threat reputation scores and status
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves reputation data for an IP address or domain from aggregated threat intelligence sources including VirusTotal integration. Accepts a target parameter (IP or domain). Returns reputation scores, malicious status, detection counts from multiple security vendors, and confidence levels. Useful for determining if a target is known to be malicious or suspicious.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description mentions VirusTotal but doesn't clarify what reputation data is returned or what inputs are required. Enhanced version specifies the target parameter, explains the output structure (scores, status, vendor detections, confidence), and clarifies the operation's purpose for threat assessment.

data.current_description: Get geographic location data including country, city, region, ISP, and coordinates.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves geographic location data for an IP address including country, city, region, ISP name, and GPS coordinates. Accepts an IP address as the target parameter. Returns location details useful for identifying the physical origin of network traffic and detecting geographically anomalous activity.
data.reasoning: Summary is generic. Description lists output fields but doesn't specify input requirements or clarify that this operation is IP-specific. Enhanced version explicitly states the IP parameter requirement and explains the use case for threat analysis.

data.current_description: Get SSL/TLS certificate information including issuer, validity, and chain details.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves SSL/TLS certificate information for a domain including issuer, validity dates, certificate chain details, and certificate transparency logs. data.current_description: Get known vulnerabilities associated with an IP address from CVE databases.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves known vulnerabilities (CVEs) associated with an IP address from aggregated CVE databases. Accepts an IP address as the target parameter. Returns a list of applicable CVEs with severity ratings, descriptions, and CVSS scores. Useful for identifying exploitable weaknesses on network infrastructure and assessing attack surface.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description correctly specifies IP input but lacks output details and threat context. Enhanced version clarifies the CVE data returned (severity, CVSS scores), explains the security relevance for vulnerability assessment, and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Get WHOIS registration data including registrant, registrar, and registration dates.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves WHOIS registration data for a domain including registrant information, registrar details, registration and expiration dates, and nameserver records. Accepts a domain as the target parameter. Returns registration metadata useful for identifying domain ownership, detecting recently registered malicious domains, and tracking infrastructure changes.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lists output fields but doesn't specify that input is domain-specific or explain the threat intelligence value. message: Operation 'searchKeywords' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description explains the use case well but lacks specifics about input format (what constitutes a valid search query) and output structure (what fields are returned). Enhanced version clarifies input expectations and output fields while maintaining the clear use case explanation.

data.current_description: Fuzzy search for similar malicious domains. Useful for finding typosquatting and phishing domains targeting a specific brand.
data.description_suggestion: Performs a fuzzy search to identify similar malicious domains based on keyword input. Accepts a search query (brand name, keyword, or domain pattern) and returns a list of known malicious domains with similar names, useful for detecting typosquatting and phishing campaigns. Results include domain reputation scores and threat classifications. Helps identify brand impersonation and domain squatting threats.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description explains the use case well but lacks specifics about input format (what constitutes a valid search query) and output structure (what fields are returned). Enhanced version clarifies input expectations and output fields while maintaining the clear use case explanation.
